intro_zh: 先听完整课文，再把现在完成时的生活更新读顺。

sentences.text: I have just received a letter from my brother, Tim.
sentences.focus_zh: 注意 have just received 的连贯。

sentences.text: He has been there for six months.
sentences.focus_zh: has been there 是状态延续，不要读散。

sentences.text: He is working for a big firm and he has already visited a great number of different places in Australia.
sentences.focus_zh: 长句先慢一点，注意 has already visited。

sentences.text: He has just bought an Australian car and has gone to Alice Springs, a small town in the centre of Australia.
sentences.focus_zh: 注意 has just bought 和 has gone to 两个动作。

sentences.text: My brother has never been abroad before, so he is finding this trip very exciting.
sentences.focus_zh: never been abroad before 是重点，后半句读出兴奋感。
